base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragonlord_logo_silhouette — a ui (logo) from 1986 dragon quest. Simplified dragon-emblem — solid blue silhouette variant (no gradient details). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Simplified dragon-emblem — solid blue silhouette variant (no gradient details); smaller logo for app-branding
